title: User Login Flow
description: As a registered user, I want to log in with valid credentials so I can access my dashboard.
preconditions: User has a registered account with email: test@example.com
Application is accessible at the configured base URL

steps.description: Verify redirect to dashboard after login
Verify welcome banner is displayed on dashboard

expected_outcomes: User is authenticated and redirected to /dashboard

negative_scenarios.title: Invalid credentials rejected
negative_scenarios.expected: Error message displayed, user remains on login page

negative_scenarios.title: Empty form submission blocked
steps: Click submit without filling any fields
negative_scenarios.expected: Validation errors shown for required fields
